title: Supreme Court Questions Trump's Citizenship Order
summary: Justices express skepticism regarding Trump's executive order on birthright citizenship, even with his courtroom appearance.

title: Wisconsin Counties Under Ice and Winter Storm Warnings
summary: The National Weather Service issued winter storm warnings for over a dozen Wisconsin counties, extending into Thursday evening.

title: Tiger Woods' Golf Future Uncertain After Crash

title: Protests Erupt as Israel Approves Death Penalty for Palestinians
